subject: WM-0169 review: verified
body: No blocking findings. PR-1 truth is accurately rebaselined at integrated prototype only: WM-0163..WM-0168/WM-0166 evidence is closed, GameSession save/internal-playable/release remain unearned, WM-0154 stays blocked, and WM-0155/WM-0156 stay frozen. ADR-0018 correctly records existing speed 3 as a real 90-TPS multiplier and limits future WM-0172 to protocolVersion 1/schema4/projection-v2, separate Pause plus 1x/2x/4x=30/60/120 TPS, strict fail closure, default-route v1 isolation, unchanged save boundaries and no PR-3 command surface. The architecture covers eight residents over 36000 ticks with indexed capped Top-K selection, versioned pathing, atomic reservations, explicit serializable activity/driver state, structured reasons, Worker authority and read-only Pixi/HUD presentation. Simulation, real interaction/continuous WebM and independent human evidence are all required; debug/fixture evidence cannot pass alone. WM-0170..WM-0175 are exact serial proposed/unclaimed tasks with write width one, self/ancestor-only check outputs, sole protocol writer WM-0172, automated integration evidence WM-0174 and independent product acceptance WM-0175. Diff contains 15 planning/control files and no apps/packages/tools implementation. validate-handoff, taskctl validate/status, diff-check, ownership/path/state/scope audits and quality 78 files/462 tests pass.
